title: Teaching Assistant (Corrector)
descriptions: Marked, graded, calculated, and recorded grades of students' assignments and tests.
Provided constructive feedbacks and helped students better understand the mistakes.

title: SW Automation Specialist
descriptions: Developed new automation test cases by JavaScript, Docker, and Mocha to validate Model Driven Mediation applications
Monitor the Selenium report routinely, followed by updating the results and discussing possible solutions with team lead twice a week
Consulted and collaborated with other software testers to ensure efficiency and functionality

title: Web UI Software Designer
descriptions: Developed and maintained web GUI components and utilities built with React and JavaScript, and integrated components into web application called Showbook
Removed deprecated components from the code, and replaced them with ones that reduced repository size by 20%
Communicated effectively with testers and UX teams and discussed UI design details under a team- based Agile environment

title: Teaching Assistant
descriptions: Led weekly office hours and provided one on one support to student to struggling with course material
Troubleshooted students’ programs and explained the reason that may cause the error.
Attended meetings with the professor to update the frequent problems encountered by students
